messages.content: I am interested in ABB 800xa. can you tell me what is it?

The ABB 800xa is a highly compact main rotor, with a diameter of only 800mm. It is used for helicopter applications in which weight, space, and/or other constraints require a compact main rotor system. It is also used in industrial applications, including pipeline inspection and construction, civil infrastructure inspection and maintenance, and general industrial service.

Modules are the primary means by which the ABB 800xa rotor system varies in size to meet the needs of different applications. The 800xa rotor system consists of one, two, or three modules, each of which can be modified to meet the specific size requirements of a particular application. For example, a one-module 800xa system has a diameter of only 575mm and a length of 2,500mm, and is used for smaller, lighter helicopters. A two-module system, which can be configured as either a 800 or 900mm rotor system, offers the best compromise between size and weight for most mid-sized or larger helicopters. A three-module system, which can be configured as either a 1000, 1100, or 1200mm rotor system, is the largest and most powerful model in the ABB 800xa family.

One module - 575mm
Two modules - 800/900mm
Three modules - 1000/1100/1200mm
